2603.16862.title: Chronos: Temporal-Aware Conversational Agents with Structured Event Retrieval for Long-Term Memory
2603.16862.paper_summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled conversational AI agents to engage in extended multi-turn interactions spanning weeks or months. However, existing memory systems struggle to reason over temporally grounded facts and preferences that evolve across months of interaction and lack effective retrieval strategies for multi-hop, time-sensitive queries over long dialogue histories. We introduce Chronos, a novel temporal-aware memory framework that decomposes raw dialogue into subject-verb-object event tuples with resolved datetime ranges and entity aliases, indexing them in a structured event calendar alongside a turn calendar that preserves full conversational context. At query time, Chronos applies dynamic prompting to generate tailored retrieval guidance for each question, directing the agent on what to retrieve, how to filter across time ranges, and how to approach multi-hop reasoning through an iterative tool-calling loop over both calendars. We evaluate Chronos with 8 LLMs, both open-source and closed-source, on the LongMemEvalS benchmark comprising 500 questions spanning six categories of dialogue history tasks. Chronos Low achieves 92.60% and Chronos High scores 95.60% accuracy, setting a new state of the art with an improvement of 7.67% over the best prior system. Ablation results reveal the events calendar accounts for a 58.9% gain on the baseline while all other components yield improvements between 15.5% and 22.3%. Notably, Chronos Low alone surpasses prior approaches evaluated under their strongest model configurations.
2603.16862.paper_summary_zh: 最近在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展使得對話式AI代理能夠進行持續的多輪互動，這些互動可以持續數週或數月。<lb/>然而，現有的記憶系統在推理隨著數月互動而演變的時間性事實和偏好方面遇到困難，並且缺乏對於長對話歷史中多跳、時間敏感查詢的有效檢索策略。<lb/>我們介紹了Chronos，一個新穎的時間感知記憶框架，它將原始對話分解為具有解決的日期時間範圍和實體別名的主語-動詞-賓語事件元組，並將它們索引在一個結構化的事件日曆中，與保留完整對話上下文的輪次日曆並行。<lb/>在查詢時，Chronos應用動態提示生成針對每個問題的量身定制檢索指導，指導代理檢索內容、如何在時間範圍內過濾，以及如何通過對兩個日曆的迭代工具調用循環來進行多跳推理。<lb/>我們在LongMemEvalS基準上對8個LLMs進行了評估，包括開源和閉源，該基準包含500個問題，跨越六類對話歷史任務。<lb/>Chronos Low達到了92.60%的準確率，而Chronos High則達到了95.60%的準確率，創造了新的技術標杆，比之前最佳系統提高了7.67%。<lb/>消融結果顯示，事件日曆對基線的增益達到58.9%，而所有其他組件的改進在15.5%到22.3%之間。<lb/>值得注意的是，Chronos Low單獨超越了在其最強模型配置下評估的先前方法。
2603.16862.author: Sahil Sen et.al.
2603.16862.authors: Sahil Sen, Elias Lumer, Anmol Gulati, Vamse Kumar Subbiah
